title: Question: Integrate Verilated code into HDL simulation using DPI
body:
---


Author Name: **Art. FR**
Original Redmine Message: 1331 from https://www.veripool.org



---

All,

I would like to validate my verilated RTL code using my existing HDL testbench in a commercial simulator.

To do so, I thought about creating a SystemVerilog shell in which I use the DPI to import my verilated code.

Something like:

module my_rtl(in1, in2, out1, out2);
...
import "DPI-C" context function void Vmy_rtl ( type???);

always @(*)
    Vmy_rtl(in1,in2,out1,out2);
 
endmodule

Has anyone done that?  Is that the right way to approach this? 

What kind of types should I declare for the IOs in the DPI import?

Would you mind sharing a simple example? e.g., a simple 4-bit flop would do.

Thanks a lot.
